case_title: NKECHI EMERUWA-NEUBERG VS. STEVEN ECHTMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (SEALED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMERUWA-NEUBERG, NKECHI

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-09-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF NKECHI EMERUWA-NEUBERG'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE NKECHI EMERUWA-NEUBERG MOTION TO STRIKE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE CROSS COMPLAINT ETC IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 7, 2022. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Defendant Nkechi Emeruwa-Neuberg' Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. KRISTEN E. DRAKE, Esq. (Tel: 415-608-8702) for plaintiff;
Defendant STEVEB ECHTMAN (Tel: 310-962-1021) in pro per (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF NKECHI EMERUWA-NEUBERG's Motion To Strike Cross-Complaint.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Nkechi Emeruwa-Neuberg motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5 which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before motion to strike is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the cross complaint etc is now due by December 7, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
